qualifications.name: Bachelor of Science
notes: Source: RU Ready! Rhodes University Undergraduate Prospectus 2026.
Admission score type: Rhodes points / APS-style score.
No NBT requirement is shown in this table.
The BSc is described as flexible, allowing subject combinations within timetable limits.
Students may combine Science majors with subjects from Commerce, Humanities and Law where permitted.
Fields: Biological Sciences, Computational Sciences, Earth Sciences, Life Sciences.
